name: oracle-db-mcp-toolkit
description: Oracle Database MCP Toolkit is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Oracle Database operations, RAG/vector workflows, and log analysis.

args: set -- java; val="${CONFIG_FILE:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DconfigFile=$val" ;; esac; val="${DB_URL:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Ddb.url=$val" ;; esac; val="${DB_USER:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Ddb.user=$val" ;; esac; val="${DB_PASSWORD:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Ddb.password=$val" ;; esac; val="${TOOLS:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Dtools=$val" ;; esac; val="${INGEST_ROOT_DIR:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DingestRootDir=$val" ;; esac; val="${INGEST_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DingestMaxFileSizeMb=$val" ;; esac; val="${OJDBC_EXT_DIR:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Dojdbc.ext.dir=$val" ;; esac; val="${TRANSPORT:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Dtransport=$val" ;; esac; val="${HTTPS_PORT:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Dhttps.port=$val" ;; esac; val="${CERTIFICATE_PATH:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DcertificatePath=$val" ;; esac; val="${CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DcertificatePassword=$val" ;; esac; val="${ENABLE_AUTHENTICATION:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DenableAuthentication=$val" ;; esac; val="${ALLOWED_HOSTS:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DallowedHosts=$val" ;; esac; val="${REDIRECT_OPENID_TO_OAUTH:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DredirectOpenIDToOAuth=$val" ;; esac; val="${AUTH_SERVER:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DauthServer=$val" ;; esac; val="${INTROSPECTION_ENDPOINT:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DintrospectionEndpoint=$val" ;; esac; val="${CLIENT_ID:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DclientId=$val" ;; esac; val="${CLIENT_SECRET:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DclientSecret=$val" ;; esac; val="${OAUTH_SCOPE_CLAIM_PATH:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-Doauth.scopeClaimPath=$val" ;; esac; val="${EDIT_TOOLS_REQUIRE_SCOPE:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DeditTools.requireScope=$val" ;; esac; val="${LIST_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRE_SCOPE:-}"; case "$val" in ''|\$\{user_config.*\}) ;; *) set -- "$@" "-DlistCredentials.requireScope=$val" ;; esac; exec "$@" -jar "${__dirname}/oracle-db-mcp-toolkit-1.0.0.jar"

tools.name: list-tools
tools.description: List all available tools with their descriptions.

tools.name: edit-tools
tools.description: Create or update YAML-defined tools in the config file. Changes are auto-reloaded.

tools.name: list-credentials
tools.description: List DBMS_CLOUD credentials available in the current schema.

tools.name: read-query
tools.description: Run a SELECT and return rows as JSON.

tools.name: write-query
tools.description: Execute DML/DDL statements with optional transaction support.

tools.name: transaction
tools.description: Manage JDBC transactions: start, resume, commit, rollback.

tools.name: db-ping
tools.description: Check database connectivity and round-trip latency.

tools.name: db-metrics-range
tools.description: Return Oracle DB cumulative metrics from V$SYSSTAT.

tools.name: explain-plan
tools.description: Generate and inspect SQL execution plans.

tools.name: jdbc-analyzer
tools.description: Analyze Oracle JDBC thin logs (stats, queries, errors, connection-events, compare, list-files).

tools.name: rdbms-analyzer
tools.description: Analyze Oracle RDBMS/SQLNet trace files (errors, packet-dumps).

tools.name: similarity-search
tools.description: Semantic vector similarity over tables with text and embedding columns.

tools.name: embed
tools.description: Embed files/table/object-storage content into vector stores as background tasks.

tools.name: task
tools.description: Track background embedding tasks (status, paginated list, cancel).

configFile.title: Toolkit Config File
configFile.description: Path to the toolkit YAML config file used for data sources and custom tools.

tools.title: Tools Filter
tools.description: Optional tools filter string for -Dtools. Use mcp-admin or explicit admin tool names to enable protected admin tools.

ingestRootDir.title: Ingest Root Directory
ingestRootDir.description: Root directory for local file ingestion with the embed tool.

ingestMaxFileSizeMb.title: Ingest Max File Size MB
ingestMaxFileSizeMb.description: Maximum file size in MB for local file and OCI object ingestion.

ojdbcExtDir.title: OJDBC Extension Directory
ojdbcExtDir.description: Directory containing optional Oracle JDBC extension jars for -Dojdbc.ext.dir.

certificatePath.title: Certificate Path
certificatePath.description: Path to the SSL certificate keystore for -DcertificatePath.

certificatePassword.title: Certificate Password
certificatePassword.description: Password for the SSL certificate keystore.

redirectOpenIDToOAuth.title: Redirect OpenID to OAuth
redirectOpenIDToOAuth.description: Set -DredirectOpenIDToOAuth to true/false for authorization server discovery compatibility.

oauthScopeClaimPath.title: OAuth Scope Claim Path
oauthScopeClaimPath.description: Dot-separated path in the OAuth introspection response that contains scopes.

editToolsRequireScope.title: Edit Tools Require Scope
editToolsRequireScope.description: Set -DeditTools.requireScope to true/false for edit-tools OAuth scope enforcement.

listCredentialsRequireScope.title: List Credentials Require Scope
listCredentialsRequireScope.description: Set -DlistCredentials.requireScope to true/false for list-credentials OAuth scope enforcement.

oracleDbToolkitAuthToken.title: Auth Token
oracleDbToolkitAuthToken.description: Optional bearer token for toolkit authentication (passed as ORACLE_DB_TOOLKIT_AUTH_TOKEN env).
